productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Economy Analog White Black Watch
description: Absolutely feminine, this fastrack analog wrist watch is a great buy for those who enjoy performance and style. With excellent touches and comfort, this watch makes for a fabulous and subtly fashionable daily wear.Case diameter: 35 mmCase thickness: 7 mmDial shape: RoundMetallic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Leather strap for comfort and styleWhite dial with a decoupled brand logo in light pink for that feminine touchDial has brand logo at 12 o& rsquo clock position, brand name at 4 o& rsquo clock position and only the 8 o& rsquo clock position mentioned, with the hour and minute hands having a textured finishQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityTang clasp to keep the watch firm in place as a belt buckleWater resistance at 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when swimming
